questions.question: 1 (a) Human blood has many different components and functions. Match each component to its function by drawing a line between them. One has been done for you. component of blood function red blood cell platelet plasma phagocyte lymphocyte engulfs pathogens transports oxygen makes antibodies transports fibrinogen involved in clotting
